materials_origin: Naproxen (gift from IPS Pharma Training Institute, Hyderabad); Sodium starch glycolate (Rajesh Chemicals, Mumbai); PVP-K-30 (Himedia Chem. Lab, Mumbai); Magnesium stearate, lactose, acetone, triethyl citrate, isopropanol (S.D Fine Chem. Lab, Mumbai); Aerozil (Sisco Research Laboratories Pvt. Ltd., Mumbai); Talc (Loba Chemie Pvt. Ltd, Mumbai); Eudragit 067_L100 and 067_S100 (gift from Degussa India Pvt. Ltd., Mumbai); Empty HPMC capsules (gift from ACG Associated Capsules Pvt. Ltd., Mumbai).
experimental_design: Optimization by varying ratio of Eudragit 067_L100:067_S100 (1:0, 2:1, 1:1, 1:2, 0:1) and coating level (10%, 15%, 20%) to achieve lag time of ~5 h and complete release at pH 7.2.

ingredients_identification.FTIR: Naproxen peaks at 1726, 1685, 1606, 1567 cm⁻¹; physical mixture with polymers showed all characteristic peaks, indicating no interaction.
ingredients_identification.DSC: Naproxen endotherm at 156.76°C; physical mixture showed similar endotherm, confirming compatibility.

coating.coating_solution_composition: Eudragit 067_L100 and/or 067_S100 6.00 g, Triethyl citrate 0.600 g, Talc 3.00 g, Acetone 34.69 g, Isopropanol 51.42 g, Water 4.29 g (total 100 g)

ftir_spectral: No interaction; peaks of naproxen intact in physical mixture.

process_parameters.compression_device: Rotary tablet press (Karnavati Engineering, Ahmadabad) with 3 mm round concave punches
process_parameters.coating_equipment: 6-inch lab scale coating pan with spray gun (United Technologies, Mumbai)

release_properties.release_mechanism: pH-dependent; Eudragit 067_L100 soluble above pH 6, Eudragit 067_S100 soluble above pH 7.
release_properties.release_profile: Not specified numerically for 067_F1; qualitative: released in pH 6.5, 6.8, and 7.2 media (failed to prevent release at pH 6.5).

tablet_properties.dissolution_profile: Not specified individually; see Figure 3 for 10% coating level group.

experimental_data.key_results: 067_F1 (1:0, 10%) failed to provide adequate lag time; released drug in pH 6.5.

release_properties.release_profile: Qualitative: released in pH 6.5, 6.8, and 7.2 (failed to prevent at pH 6.5).

experimental_data.key_results: 067_F2 (1:0, 15%) failed to provide adequate lag time; released in pH 6.5.

release_properties.release_profile: Qualitative: released in pH 6.5, 6.8, and 7.2 (failed to prevent at pH 6.5).

experimental_data.key_results: 067_F3 (1:0, 20%) failed to provide adequate lag time; released in pH 6.5.

release_properties.release_profile: Qualitative: released in pH 6.5, 6.8, and 7.2 (failed to prevent at pH 6.5).

experimental_data.key_results: 067_F4 (2:1, 10%) failed to provide adequate lag time; released in pH 6.5.

release_properties.release_profile: Qualitative: released in pH 6.5, 6.8, and 7.2 (failed to prevent at pH 6.5).

experimental_data.key_results: 067_F5 (2:1, 15%) failed to provide adequate lag time; released in pH 6.5.

release_properties.release_profile: Qualitative: released in pH 6.5, 6.8, and 7.2 (failed to prevent at pH 6.5).

experimental_data.key_results: 067_F6 (2:1, 20%) failed to provide adequate lag time; released in pH 6.5.

release_properties.release_profile: Qualitative: released in pH 6.5, 6.8, and 7.2 (failed to prevent at pH 6.5).

experimental_data.key_results: 067_F7 (1:1, 10%) failed to provide adequate lag time; released in pH 6.5.

release_properties.release_profile: Qualitative: released in pH 6.5, 6.8, and 7.2 (failed to prevent at pH 6.5).

experimental_data.key_results: 067_F8 (1:1, 15%) failed to provide adequate lag time; released in pH 6.5.

release_properties.release_profile: Qualitative: prevented release in pH 1.2 and 6.5, but released in pH 6.8 and 7.2.

experimental_data.key_results: 067_F9 (1:1, 20%) provided some lag but released at pH 6.8, not ideal.

release_properties.release_profile: Qualitative: released in pH 6.5, 6.8, and 7.2 (failed to prevent at pH 6.5).

experimental_data.key_results: 067_F10 (1:2, 10%) failed to provide adequate lag time; released in pH 6.5.

release_properties.release_profile: Qualitative: prevented release in pH 1.2 and 6.5, but released in pH 6.8 and 7.2.

experimental_data.key_results: 067_F11 (1:2, 15%) provided some lag but released at pH 6.8, not ideal.

release_properties.release_mechanism: pH-dependent; released after lag time at pH 7.2
release_properties.release_profile: Lag time 5.02 ± 0.4 h, 99.40 ± 0.4% released at end of 8 h

tablet_properties.stability: Stable for 6 months as per ICH guidelines; drug content reduced by 0.90 ± 0.55% over 6 months; dissolution profile variation <1%

experimental_data.key_results: Optimized formulation; met desired lag time and complete release at pH 7.2.
experimental_data.statistical_analysis: No significant difference before and after stability (p ≤ 0.05)

release_properties.release_profile: Qualitative: prevented release in pH 1.2 and 6.5, but released in pH 6.8 and 7.2.

experimental_data.key_results: 067_F13 (0:1, 10%) provided some lag but released at pH 6.8, not ideal.

release_properties.release_profile: Qualitative: prevented release in pH 1.2, 6.5, and 6.8, but failed to release maximum drug by 8 h.

experimental_data.key_results: 067_F14 (0:1, 15%) had excessive lag; incomplete release by 8 h.

release_properties.release_profile: Qualitative: prevented release in pH 1.2, 6.5, and 6.8, but failed to release maximum drug by 8 h.

experimental_data.key_results: 067_F15 (0:1, 20%) had excessive lag; incomplete release by 8 h.
